title: Deliciously Crunchy Brazilian Sausage Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Brazilian dish featuring sausages, render-fat, and a crunchy texture, this recipe is diabetic-friendly and perfect for a snack or dinner.

ingredients.name: Brazilian sausages
ingredients.notes: preferably made with chicken or turkey

instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the sausages, onion, bell pepper, and zucchini onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the rendered fat onto the sausages and vegetables.
Sprinkle the salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika over the skewers.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the sausages are cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Let the skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Serve with a side of quinoa or brown rice for a filling and diabetic-friendly meal.
